DO NOT USE! Entire US Portfolio WIPED OUT to ZERO! Absolutely terrible experience. I logged in today to find my entire US stock portfolio and my wallet balance completely empty. It is showing a zero balance! How can a financial app that holds people's hard-earned money just have everything disappear? There is zero communication, no immediate customer support, and no explanation for this technical disaster. It is incredibly stressful and panic-inducing to see your investments just vanish.

Serious Concern Regarding Incorrect Auto-Linked Bank Account I recently noticed that my INDmoney account is showing a bank account number and IFSC code that are completely unknown to me. I have never added, authorized, or linked this account at any point. This appears to have been auto-linked by the system, which raises serious concerns about account security, data accuracy, and fund safety. I hope the support team resolves this matter urgently and transparently.

Everything in the app is pretty good and smooth in terms of performance, but the recent UI update is not very appealing. The previous UI felt better and more intuitive.
